titleInfo.title: Yingshan Xian Taipeng Shan shiku neirong zonglu
營山縣太蓬山石窟内容總録
General Index of the Contents of the Cave Shrines on Mount Taipeng, Yingshan County

mods.abstract:
Official English translation: “The general index of the contents of Taipeng Shan Grottoes Yingshan County”
This is basically a description of each of the 95+9 caves/niches at Taipeng Shan, surveyed in 2008. Touming Cliff 透明岩/巖 has 34 niches on its west side (numbered 透K1–34), and 41 niches on its east side (numbered 透 K35–75). Caves 透K76–84 are located on the south wall of the opening [between two hills/cliffs?] 穿洞, and caves 透85–95 on the north wall of 穿洞. All caves on Touming Cliff are dated to the Song or Tang. The groups of caves located at the South Gate 南門, numbered 南K1–3, and on the North Gate 北門, numbered北K1–6, are all from the Qing.
For each cave/niche, measurements and brief descriptions of the architecture and images are given. Inscriptions or their fragments are indicated. Transcriptions of the following inscriptions are provided: K16 馮可振造像碑記 dated 895 (p. 42); K29 安祿山題龕, dated 713 (p. 44); K45 fragment of a Tang votive inscription (p. 45); K53 fragments of 妙法蓮華經普賢菩薩勸發品第二十八 (T.262; p. 46). p. 41 descriptions of K7 and K8 with measurements, inscriptions identified (but not vajra inscription in cave 8)
